note: Advisory sandbox emitter. Produces a DRAFT dictionary-fix PROPOSAL (candidate entries), never a write to dictionary_index.json and never a governance PASS.
title: DLM -> language_gate dictionary-fix PROPOSAL emitter

subject.note: runs the DLM dictionary_check over the 80-item fixture with all DLM writes redirected to a temp dir (dlm_core_v1.OUTPUT_DIR/RECEIPTS_DIR + dlm_pipeline_v1.OUTPUT_DIR monkeypatched, per TH-2); emits proposal to this build dir only

what_it_proves: REAL 80-item fixture -> proposal with candidate_count=0 (verdict NO_FIX_NEEDED): the corpus is fully dictionary-covered today (48 flags = 32 DICTIONARY_OK + 16 CODE_ALIAS_OK, 0 DICTIONARY_FIX_NEEDED)

NEGATIVE by MINIMAL MUTATION of the real fixture on disk (inject one undefined term `zorptflux capsule` into item[0].question) -> that term appears as a proposal CANDIDATE and the CLI exits 1 (a hit) — RED-before-GREEN

POSITIVE CONTROL / no-relaxation: injecting a term that IS already in dictionary_index.json (`agnostic`) the same way -> it is NOT re-proposed; a zero-candidate run therefore can't be a broken-regex false-clean
running the emitter leaves dictionary_index.json byte-identical (sha unchanged); the tool hard-refuses to target dictionary_index.json as its --out
proposal stamped origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none / status=DRAFT / pass_claimed=false; verdict vocab is NO_FIX_NEEDED / FIX_NEEDED_TERMS_FOUND, never PASS
chess_patches_applied: runs the REAL DLM dictionary_check over the REAL fixture (no strawman classifier); writes redirected to temp per TH-2 (Lock 5)
negative fixture is a MINIMAL MUTATION of the real on-disk fixture (one injected term), not a fabricated corpus; the injected term only extracts+flags because it is genuinely undefined
guard is proven live by a positive-control term already in the dictionary being skipped — the skip is not vacuous
detector exit contract: non-empty candidate list -> exit 1; a seeded hit proves the nonzero exit is reachable (not an always-exit-0 audit)
emitter is proposal-only: never opens dictionary_index.json for write; refuses --out == dictionary_index.json
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (dictionary_index.json unmodified; DLM output|receipts untouched via temp-dir redirect; proposal written only inside catalog/builds/BR-2/)
no live call (no network, no Supabase, no sends, HOME=temp)
wrote only inside my build dir; touched no gate/shared files
